data.name: Peritya

weaponImprint.name: Optical Illusion
weaponImprint.trait: If AoE damage is dealt, apply 1 debuff for 1 turn. If the target has 3 or more debuffs, this attack ignores 15% of their Cover damage reduction.
weaponImprint.effect: Each time an attack successfully hits 3/3/3/3/2/2 targets, the damage of the next active skill is increased by 10%/15%/20%/20%/20%/20%, with an additional increase of 10%/10%/10%/15%/20%/20% damage for AoE skills. After dealing damage, there is a 20%/36%/54%/68%/84%/100% chance to apply 1/1/1/1/1/2 debuff(s) to the target.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to Varjagers by 2.5%. If using a basic skill, increase the damage by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: Combat, survival, and a spectrum of emotions are all part of this vast world. Compared to the digital realm, she finds countless undiscovered pleasures in this expansive reality. Hm... that cloud has finally covered the sun. Time to lie down and rest for a while.

skills.name: Rapid Overwrite
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Chain Reaction
skills.description: When an enemy unit within range takes AoE damage from an allied unit, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 50% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, as well as gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. This effect can trigger up to 6 times per turn. Before the attack, every 1 point of leftover mobility enhances the damage dealt by the attack by 10%, up to a maximum increase of 30%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: When an enemy unit within range takes AoE damage from an allied unit, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 50% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, as well as gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. This effect can trigger up to 10 times per turn. Before the attack, every 1 point of leftover mobility enhances the damage dealt by the attack by 10%, up to a maximum increase of 30%. If no movement was made before the active attack, gains 2 points of Confectance Index after the attack.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If no movement is made before an active attack, gain 2 points of Confectance Index after attacking.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] can be triggered an additional 4 times per turn.

skills.name: Fixed Erosion
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy within 8 tiles, dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 85% of attack to the target and all enemies within a 3x3 area, and cleanses 1 buff.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The number of buffs that can be cleansed is increased by 2.

skills.name: Domain Suppression
skills.description: Select a tile within 8 tiles as the center. Deal AoE Physical damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy targets within 1 tile of the center and pull them 1 tile towards it. For each target hit, reduce this skill's cooldown by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Effective range is increased by 1 tile.

skills.name: Multi-Compilation
skills.description: Deals AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets within a 9x9 area centered on self, excluding the inner 5x5 area. For each target hit, increases damage dealt by 5%, up to 15%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: For each enemy target hit, increase additional damage dealt by 5%, up to a 25% increase.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The excluded area is reduced to 3x3 within the 9x9 area centered on self.

keys.effect: If an active skill hits 2 or more enemy targets, damage dealt is increased by 7%.
keys.displayTitle: Common Key - All Points to Damage

keys.effect:
When dealing Corrosion Damage to a target, damage dealt is increased by 5% for each debuff on them, to a maximum increase of 25%.

When the Ultimate skill Polycompilation hits the enemy target, it pulls them 2 tiles toward this unit.

After every 2 instances of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] in 1 round, the next instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is changed to deal AoE Corrosion Damage equal to 50% of attack to the target and all enemy targets within a 3×3 tile area of this unit and 2 points of stability damage.
Gains 1 point of Confectance Index for every 10 points of stability damage dealt.
If there is remaining mobility before attacking, gains [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] at the end of the action for 1 turn.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 2 - Impromptu Cat and Mouse Game

keys.effect: If no movement is made before attacking, cleanses 2 debuffs from self.
Increases damage dealt by the active skill Domain Suppression to targets immune to displacement effects by 15%.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
Increases stability damage dealt to the primary target by the active skill Fixed Erosion by 4 points.

vertebrae.effect: The number of buffs that can be cleansed is increased by 2.

doll.name: Peritya
doll.effects: Combat, survival, and a spectrum of emotions are all part of this vast world. Compared to the digital realm, she finds countless undiscovered pleasures in this expansive reality. Hm... that cloud has finally covered the sun. Time to lie down and rest for a while.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by Support Attacks is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.
